subagents.name: core-planner
subagents.description: Produces the initial draft plan using core invariants only. Outputs to .swarm/runs/{id}/plan.json.
subagents.invoke: Use the core-planner subagent with the given input

subagents.name: constraint-reviewer
subagents.description: Applies one domain rule pack to a draft plan. Outputs constraint-reviewer.{groupId}.result.json.
subagents.invoke: Use the constraint-reviewer subagent with the path to handoff.json

subagents.name: plan-integrator
subagents.description: Merges planner and constraint reviewer outputs into the integrated execution plan.
subagents.invoke: Use the plan-integrator subagent with the path to handoff.json

subagents.name: plan-decomposer
subagents.description: Splits large cross-project plans into context-sized sub-plans when threshold exceeded.
subagents.invoke: Use the plan-decomposer subagent with the path to handoff.json

subagents.name: implementor
subagents.description: Implements tasks from handoff.json. Input: path to handoff.json. Outputs implementor.result.json.
subagents.invoke: Use the implementor subagent with the path to handoff.json

subagents.name: reviewer
subagents.description: Reviews changes. Input: path to handoff.json. Verifies conformance to standards. Outputs reviewer.result.json.
subagents.invoke: Use the reviewer subagent with the path to handoff.json

subagents.name: tester
subagents.description: Runs the project's testing suite. Input: path to handoff.json. Outputs tester.result.json.
subagents.invoke: Use the tester subagent with the path to handoff.json

subagents.name: verifier
subagents.description: Validates completed work after tester completes. Input: path to handoff.json. Confirms implementations functional and can attribute tester failures. Outputs verifier.result.json. Last stop.
subagents.invoke: Use the verifier subagent with the path to handoff.json

handoff-notes.core-planner: Hand off to constraint-reviewer with draft plan and activeGroupIds.
handoff-notes.constraint-reviewer: If remainingConstraintGroupIds non-empty: hand off to self for next group. Else: hand off to plan-integrator.
handoff-notes.plan-integrator: Hand off to plan-decomposer with integrated plan.
handoff-notes.plan-decomposer: Hand off to implementor (passthrough if 1 sub-plan; else Manager iterates over sub-plans).
handoff-notes.reviewer: If approved: hand off to tester. If rejected: hand off to implementor with issues to fix.
handoff-notes.tester: Hand off to verifier after tester completes. Include tester status/details in the handoff; failed tests still lead to verifier when attribution must be assessed.
handoff-notes.verifier: Last stop. Hands off to no other agent.

escalation-actions.needs-human: Stop with outcome needs-human; report that human review is required.
escalation-actions.downgrade-scope: Stop and suggest reducing scope; leave partial work.
escalation-actions.manual-intervention-required: Stop; write manual-intervention-required.result.json with context for human to resume.
